mxCell.value:
[GET] /sessions
[GET] /sessions/{id}
[GET] /sessions/{id}/bookings - UPGRADE (WS) 
[POST] /session/{id}/bookings/reserves
[POST/PUT] /sessions/{id}/held/{id}/checkout

STATUS:
AVAILABLE
LOCKED
RESERVED

key: {id_session}
{
session: uuid
version: int 
rowsIndex: [A, B, C, D...]
rows: {
A : {
bookings: [
{
id: A1
status: AVAILABLE
held_id: int
expires_at: timestamp
},
{
id: A2
status: LOCKED
held_id: int
expires_at: timestamp
},

{
id: A3
status: RESERVED
held_id: int
expires_at: timestamp
},
]
}
}
}
